scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/cases/index.js beta
scripts.clinic:beta:doctor: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --dest .clinic/beta/doctor --name beta-doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta:flame: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --dest .clinic/beta/flame --name beta-flame -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta:bubbleprof: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --dest .clinic/beta/bubbleprof --name beta-bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js beta || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:beta: npm run clinic:beta:doctor && npm run clinic:beta:flame && npm run clinic:beta:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:v3:doctor: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --dest .clinic/v3/doctor --name v3-doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3:flame: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --dest .clinic/v3/flame --name v3-flame -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3:bubbleprof: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --dest .clinic/v3/bubbleprof --name v3-bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js v3 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v3: npm run clinic:v3:doctor && npm run clinic:v3:flame && npm run clinic:v3:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:v4:doctor: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic doctor --dest .clinic/v4/doctor --name v4-doctor -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4:flame: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic flame --dest .clinic/v4/flame --name v4-flame -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4:bubbleprof: find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete && NO_INSIGHT=1 clinic bubbleprof --dest .clinic/v4/bubbleprof --name v4-bubbleprof -- node dist/cases/index.js v4 || true && find . -name 'node_trace.*.log' -type f -delete
scripts.clinic:v4: npm run clinic:v4:doctor && npm run clinic:v4:flame && npm run clinic:v4:bubbleprof
scripts.clinic:all: npm run build && npm run clinic:beta && npm run clinic:v3 && npm run clinic:v4 && npm run cleanup:traces
